prompt: A realistic photograph of a {argument name="cat color" default="black"} cat standing on its hind legs, with its front paws resting on the {argument name="seat color" default="red"} seat of a small, white toy convertible car. The scene takes place at an outdoor go-kart track with asphalt, white painted lines, and orange-and-white striped track barriers. Above the cat and car is a teal canopy structure featuring a blue sign that reads "{argument name="sign text" default="* Go! Cart"}" in red and yellow lettering, next to a checkered flag graphic. The background is softly blurred, showing trees, blue fencing, and another distant kart, captured in natural daylight.
translatedPrompt: 一张逼真的照片，展示了一只 {argument name="cat color" default="黑色"} 的猫用后腿站立，前爪搭在 {argument name="seat color" default="红色"} 的小型白色敞篷玩具车座椅上。场景位于户外卡丁车赛道，地面为沥青材质，绘有白色标线，并设有橙白相间的赛道护栏。猫和玩具车上方是一个青色的顶棚结构，上面挂着一块蓝色标牌，用红黄两色字体写着“{argument name="sign text" default="* Go! Cart"}”，旁边配有方格旗图案。背景经过柔焦处理，隐约可见树木、蓝色围栏和远处另一辆卡丁车，画面在自然光下拍摄。

breakdown.creativeCore: 卡丁车赛道上的猫与玩具车：生成一张逼真的照片，展示一只猫在户外赛车场与一辆微型汽车互动。
breakdown.subject: 产品
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 品牌字标、标题字、活动视觉、字体风格探索

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 字体/Logo image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
